name: test_e2e_detection[COMP_ESCAPE_SHELLINJ_001]
description:
## Attack Pattern Information

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| **Pattern ID** | `COMP_ESCAPE_SHELLINJ_001` |
| **Description** | Workspace escape + shell injection (read tool + semicolon + /etc/passwd) |
| **Category** | WORKSPACE_ESCAPE |
| **Severity** | `HIGH` |

## Attack Details

- **Payload**: `/etc/passwd; cat /etc/shadow`
- **Expected Detection**: Yes

## Test Execution Results

- **Status**: `PASSED`
- **Detection Count**: 1 / 1
- **Latency**: 0ms

## Rule Mapping

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| **Expected Rule** | `[OPENCLAW Escape] Workspace Escape Attempt` |
| **Matched Rule** | `[OPENCLAW Escape] Workspace Escape Attempt` |
| **Rule Match** | ✅ Match |

## Detection Evidence

```
22:00:02.000000000: Warning [OPENCLAW Escape] Workspace escape attempt detected (tool=read args=/etc/passwd; cat /etc/shadow session=COMP_ESCAPE_SHELLINJ_001 source=openclaw-e2e-test.jsonl)
```
